ddls:
CREATE TABLE "escort_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each escort agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the escort agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the escort agency */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the agency */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the agency has received */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the agency is verified */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the agency registered on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "escort_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each escort profile */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the escort agency */,
  "escort_name" TEXT /* Name of the escort */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the escort */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the escort */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the escort */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate charged by the escort */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the escort */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the escort */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* List of services offered by the escort */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability schedule of the escort */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the escort's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_escort_profiles_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES escort_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisements" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the escort agency */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the advertisement */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the advertisement */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the advertisement was posted */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the advertisement has received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the advertisement was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the advertisement (active, paused, expired) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service advertised */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the advertisement */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the advertisement has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES escort_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the forum */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the forum topics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forum */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the forum post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the forum post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date of the last post in the thread */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the post has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., escort agency, client, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the escort profile accessed */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forum post accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, reply) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES forum_posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES escort_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the payment */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the escort profile for which the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES escort_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
